ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wines" (
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine */,
  "title" TEXT /* Name of the wine */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the wine is produced */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-region where the wine is produced */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province where the wine is produced */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the wine (e.g., Serra della Contessa) */,
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variety of the wine */,
  "winery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winery that produced the wine */,
  "vintage" INTEGER /* Year the wine was produced */,
  "alcohol_level" REAL /* Percentage of alcohol in the wine */,
  "food_pairing" TEXT /* Suggested food pairings for the wine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_variety_id FOREIGN KEY ("variety_id") REFERENCES varieties ("variety_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_winery_id FOREIGN KEY ("winery_id") REFERENCES wineries ("winery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "tasting_notes" TEXT /* Detailed tasting notes for the wine */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the wine */,
  "rating_scale" TEXT /* Rating scale used by the reviewer */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points given to the wine */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the wine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "taster_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "taster_twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the reviewer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the reviewer */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the reviewer */,
  "rating_scale" TEXT /* Default rating scale used by the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the province is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wineries" (
  "winery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each winery */,
  "winery_name" TEXT /* Name of the winery */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the winery */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the winery */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the winery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("winery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "varieties" (
  "variety_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variety */,
  "variety_name" TEXT /* Name of the variety */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the variety */,
  "tasting_notes" TEXT /* Typical tasting notes for the variety */,
  "food_pairing" TEXT /* Suggested food pairings for the variety */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variety_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, reviewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "user_review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the user wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)
